completed_work: Added validate_l0_summary_record and helper validators for real L0ChunkSummary.to_dict output.
Wired validation into create_l0_chunk before JSON write.
Wired validation into provider L0 record loading.
Updated prompt-context and CLI tests to use complete L0 JSON records.
key_decisions: Validate L0 summary JSON records at the record-shape layer instead of adding a dataclass from_dict deserializer.
Malformed L0 store entries remain unavailable/not_found for provider summaries; detailed malformed-store diagnostics are deferred to a separate slice.
next_actions: Record the next target after L0 record-shape validation, likely malformed L0 store diagnostics or guarded explicit L0 context-pack inclusion.
risks: Commit 21ebb9a was pushed before full-suite repair; commit ddb534d restored green main.
summary_text: Added real-shape validation for L0 summary JSON records. The validator is grounded in L0ChunkSummary.to_dict and requires chunk_reference, citation, l0_summary, keyphrases, entities, claims, risks, created_at, and last_refreshed_at, with optional generator/provenance validation. create_l0_chunk validates generated records before writing. Provider L0 loading validates JSON records and treats malformed records as unavailable rather than inventing a new drop reason. CLI L0 fixtures were updated to the complete validated record shape. Full test suite passed after the repair commit.
